name: ASUS PRIME H610M-A D4-CSM Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR4-3200 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-A - DisplayPort 1.4 - D-Sub - HDMI 2.1 - Intel GbE LAN - V-M.2 (Key E) for Wi-Fi
shortName: ASUS PRIME H610M-A D4-CSM Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: ASUS PRIME H610M Micro-ATX motherboard with DDR4 support and WiFi connectivity for entry-level builds.
